name: Improper Synchronization
description: The product utilizes multiple threads or processes but fails to properly synchronize access to shared resources that should be exclusive to one process at a time. This can lead to race conditions, data corruption, or denial of service.
detection_pattern: Multiple TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes access the same STORAGE node concurrently without a CONTROL[lock] or CONTROL[mutex] node mediating exclusive access to the shared resource
